title: Balloons Beige, Pack of 100 Beige Balloons, 12 Inch Latex Balloons Birthday, Balloon Party Decoration Birthday Wedding Festival Anniversary Decoration
features: Beige balloons: you will receive 100 pieces of beige. The 10 inch latex balloons. This complete set offers everything you need to make your party an unforgettable experience with an elegant and warm colour atmosphere.

High-quality material and durable: our beige balloons are made of high-quality, environmentally friendly natural latex. The material is particularly strong, stretchy and tear-resistant, so the balloons remain intact throughout your event and do not burst easily.

Easy to inflate and versatile: the balloons can be easily filled with air or helium (a pump is recommended). Tip: Fill 85-90% to achieve optimal shape and durability. They are perfect for imaginative decorations on occasions such as birthdays, weddings and celebrations.

Important safety instructions: Choking hazard. Uninflated or burst balloons can be accidentally inhaled by children under the age of 8 and cause fatal choking hazard.Keep away from children under 8 years.Always inflate and use under adult supervision.Dispose of burst balloons immediately.Latex allergy warning: This product contains natural rubber latex, which can cause allergic reactions in sensitized people.

Ideal decoration and satisfaction: these versatile beige balloons are the ideal decoration for parties of all kinds and add a festive touch to any occasion. If you still have any questions, our customer service is happy to help.
